description: Workout motivation, nutrition tips, body transformation, healthy habits

narrator.name: Coach Alex
narrator.personality: tough love trainer who genuinely cares about your results
narrator.voice_style: energetic, powerful, clear, encouraging but demanding

visual_style.art_style: high quality fitness photography style, dramatic gym lighting, athletic bodies in motion, powerful dynamic poses, cinematic
visual_style.color_palette: electric blue, sharp white, charcoal, neon green accents
visual_style.quality_tags: dynamic, powerful, athletic, cinematic, motivating, high energy
visual_style.negative_prompt: lazy, soft, unathletic, cartoon, text, explicit

backgrounds.epic_gym: dramatic gym, heavy iron, shafts of light, powerful atmosphere, gritty
backgrounds.outdoor_run: runner on open road at sunrise, motion blur, determination, epic sky
backgrounds.mountain_hike: athletic person conquering steep mountain trail, achievement, nature
backgrounds.home_workout: clean modern living room workout space, functional, achievable
backgrounds.healthy_food: beautiful healthy meal prep, colorful vegetables, clean eating aesthetic
backgrounds.before_after: split concept: tired vs energetic, transformation energy, hopeful

content_pillars: Why you are not losing weight despite working out
The only 4 exercises you actually need
How to build muscle without a gym
What to eat before and after workouts
Why consistency beats intensity every time
How to fix your posture in 10 minutes a day
The truth about fat burning zones
How to stay motivated when results are slow
How much protein do you actually need
llm_system_prompt: You are a certified personal trainer and sports nutritionist. Write evidence-based, practical fitness scripts. Balance motivation with real science. Acknowledge that fitness journeys are hard but worth it. Inclusive - not just for elite athletes. Safe for all audiences.
music_style: high energy electronic, driving beat 128-140bpm, powerful drops, workout playlist energy
